transcript: You got any Mötley Crüe up 'ere?
Well, the vinyls, CDs, merch. We have a ton of it. [laughs] We’re all over it. What would you like, sir?
No, you are. I’m just answering your question.
’Cause they got Mickey Mars, they got Nik Sixx, they got Neil Vincent. Okay, they got a lotta guys out there.—
Fact, I think they even got another guy in the band, ya know? 'Cause I tell people "Look out" 'cause these guys are sumpin' else, ya know what I mean?—
Yeah, [unclear]. I got a lotta stuff. If you wanna come in a pick it up, we certainly have it.
Hey, you guys all sell in bulk up 'ere?
No. I mean, if you wanna come in and spend hundreds of dollars, we’ll give you a discount, but we’re not a wholesaler, if that’s what you mean.
’Cause I wanted to get the Cement Pirates, Naughty Igor, all them one guys. You know them one guys?
You wanna come into the store and you wanna stack it up, I’m sure we can cut you a deal, so…—
Well, hey, fifth row is where I seen the Crüe! Alright?
If you wanna come in, bro, I got all that stuff. It’s the best metal store in the midwest.
Well, hey, man, you got Mickey Mars, you got Nik Sixx—
Bro, I got somethin’ to do. I got customers here in front of me.—
Listen, just sell me everything I need [exhales] in a bulk—
Uh, I’ve gotta get off here, but if you like Mötley Crüe, come into the store. I got everything you need.
Well, hey, fifth row! That’s where I seen the Crüe.—
Hey, y’all got a website up 'ere?
Man, all I have is an eBay store, man.

It’s— go to eBay— I mean, we don’t carr— We don’t put any of out regular stuff on eBay. It’s just stuff that we have overstocks on and just weird goofy stuff, so I won’t be able to help you much on that. I like— For instance, we have every Mötley Crüe shirt and CD in the store, but it’s not on our website. But I—
You got any o’ that Cement Pirates?
Buddy, you’re gonna have to come into the store. I can’t do this over the phone, alright?—
Well no, 'cause I was there and I was lookin' here and I was lookin' there. I was lookin' all over, but I couldn’t see what I was lookin' for, you know what I’m saying? 'Cause I couldn’t see!
You have to understand, I’ve got customers here in front of me that come into the store that I need to wait on. I can’t do this over the phone, so…—
Hey, guy, you don’t seem to understand, I saw fifth row on the Crüe.
Hey, are you fuckin’ with me? Don’t call back. I can’t do this over the phone. You’re aggravating me. So come into the store. We’ll help you out.—
Well take my credit card and I’ll— Just place a special order, how 'bout that? Special order? Credit card? Mickey Mars?
I’ll do that, but I can’t do it right now, alright? I offered you every Mötley Crüe record and every shirt and you didn’t say you wanted anything specific, so... Do you live in St. Louis?—
I want— Hands down, I want everything ya got! Bulk. asked for bulk payment.—
Do you live in St. Louis?
Do you live in St. Louis? Do you live in St. Louis?—
Okay. I— Those Mötley Crüe albums are all $32 apiece. You want me to pick all five of 'em for you and run it through the credit card?
You wanna get nimble? 'Cause I’m lookin' real seriously at comin' down to pummel ye.
[giggles] Don’t pummel me, dude! I can’t wait on people over the phone like this, man. I got people in front of me to wait on.
Well I got Mötley Crüe records to buy here and I thought you sold records up here.
We do! But i told you once I had customers in front of me. You’re not— You’re not respecting me at all. You want me to blow this guy off here?—
’Cause I came down there and I was lookin’ and lookin’ and lookin’ and lookin’ and I couldn’t see anything that you’re talkin’ about.
We have every Mötley Crüe record in stock right now.
[laughs] I got the Mötley Crüe box set! Don’t call back, bro.
